'''tathada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sqr|sqr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sqr|sqr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tathada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæthædæth|tæthædæth]] || [[word:tæthædæj|tæthædæj]] || [[word:tæthædæsh|tæthædæsh]] || [[word:tæthædæ|tæthædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathathadath|tathathadath]] || [[word:tathathadaj|tathathadaj]] || [[word:tathathadash|tathathadash]] || [[word:tathathada|tathathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathadath|tathadath]] || [[word:tathadaj|tathadaj]] || [[word:tathadash|tathadash]] || [[word:tathada|tathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathafdath|tathafdath]] || [[word:tathafdaj|tathafdaj]] || [[word:tathafdash|tathafdash]] || [[word:tathafdaf|tathafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tathadatha|tathadatha]] || [[word:tathadaja|tathadaja]] || [[word:tathadasha|tathadasha]] || [[word:tathadaka|tathadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tathadath|tathadath]] || [[word:tathadaj|tathadaj]] || [[word:tathadash|tathadash]] || [[word:tathada|tathada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tathadathal|tathadathal]] || [[word:tathadajal|tathadajal]] || [[word:tathadashal|tathadashal]] || [[word:tathadakal|tathadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tathadathatha|tathadathatha]] || [[word:tathadajaja|tathadajaja]] || [[word:tathadashasha|tathadashasha]] || [[word:tathadaka|tathadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tathadathan|tathadathan]] || [[word:tathadajan|tathadajan]] || [[word:tathadashan|tathadashan]] || [[word:tathadakan|tathadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tathadathaoro|tathadathaoro]] || [[word:tathadajaoro|tathadajaoro]] || [[word:tathadashaoro|tathadashaoro]] || [[word:tathadakaoro|tathadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
